messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Daily briefing diagrams look blurry — render the cid-PNGs at higher resolution (not SVG)
What it solves: WHAT THE HUMAN ACTUALLY WANTS: crisp diagrams. The intake asked to switch PNG->SVG, but the
specifier asked why (2026-07-15) and the human answered the PNGs "look blurry" and chose "keep the
Gmail-safe cid-PNG pipeline but render at higher resolution" over switching to SVG. So THIS TICKET
DOES NOT …
How it works: A rendered diagram PNG is at least 3200 pixels wide (up from 1600)
